name: Publish Package (NuGet Release)
description: Publishes NuGet packages to nuget.org and optionally creates a GitHub release with attached packages.

artifact_name.description: Name of the NuGet artifact to download (e.g., nuget-packages)

commit_count.description: Number of recent commits to include

create_github_release.description: Whether to create a GitHub release

NUGET_API_KEY.description: API key for publishing to NuGet.org

GITHUB_TOKEN.description: GitHub token for creating releases (if enabled)

release_url.description: URL of the created GitHub release (if created)
